# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

TEMP_FILE="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
TEMP_FILE_2="/tmp/myapp-$$-secondary.tmp"
RESULT_FILE="/tmp/myapp-$$-results.tmp"

# Initialize temp files
> "$TEMP_FILE"
> "$TEMP_FILE_2"
> "$RESULT_FILE"

# Simulate data collection
echo "Collecting data..."
for i in {1..100}; do
    echo "data_entry_$i:$RANDOM" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
done

# Process data - sort and filter
echo "Processing data in $TEMP_FILE..."
sort "$TEMP_FILE" > "$TEMP_FILE_2"
grep -E ":[0-9]{4,}$" "$TEMP_FILE_2" > "$TEMP_FILE"

# Calculate statistics
echo "Calculating statistics..."
total_lines=$(wc -l < "$TEMP_FILE")
echo "Total entries: $total_lines" > "$RESULT_FILE"

# Extract numeric values and calculate average
awk -F: '{sum+=$2; count++} END {print "Average: " sum/count}' "$TEMP_FILE" >> "$RESULT_FILE"

# Find min and max values
awk -F: '{print $2}' "$TEMP_FILE" | sort -n | head -1 | xargs echo "Min value:" >> "$RESULT_FILE"
awk -F: '{print $2}' "$TEMP_FILE" | sort -n | tail -1 | xargs echo "Max value:" >> "$RESULT_FILE"

# Generate report
echo "========================================" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
echo "PROCESSING REPORT" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
echo "========================================" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
cat "$RESULT_FILE" >> "$TEMP_FILE"

# Display final results
echo ""
echo "Final Report:"
cat "$TEMP_FILE"

# Write output to final destination
cp "$TEMP_FILE" "/tmp/myapp-final-$$.txt"
echo ""
echo "Results saved to /tmp/myapp-final-$$.txt"

# Cleanup
rm -f "$TEMP_FILE" "$TEMP_FILE_2" "$RESULT_FILE"
